message:
refactor(freeze): Continue Zig codegen removal - batch 4

- Remove Zig branches from get_length, catch, set_var_ref0/1/2/3
- Remove Zig branches from put_var_ref_check, nip_catch
- Remove Zig branches from get_array_el, delete

57 isZig() calls remain (down from 64), all returning false.
Verified: frozen fib benchmark produces correct result (9227465, ~28ms)
